idea-plugin.name: Islands Light with Test-Aware Tabs
idea-plugin.description: Islands Light fork that flags atypical files in the editor tab strip. The file in the active tab gets the IDE's Tests scope icon (red/green triangles) when it lives in a test source root, or a warning icon when it's a non-project file from outside the project — inactive tabs keep their regular icons. The active tab's island fill is also translucent, so a test file's scope color shows through. Based on JetBrains' Islands Light theme (Apache 2.0).
